CREATE TABLE events (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, timestamp '2020-09-28 18:40:05');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (2, timestamp '2020-02-29 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (3, timestamp '2022-01-01 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (4, timestamp '1999-12-31 23:59:59');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (5, timestamp '2020-11-30 15:45:30');
SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_time = timestamp '2020-09-28 18:40:05';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time < timestamp '2021-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT id, event_time FROM events WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM events WHERE event_time > timestamp '2020-01-01 00:00:00');
CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, last_login TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, timestamp '2020-09-28 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, timestamp '2019-12-31 23:59:59');
SELECT e.id, e.event_time FROM events e INNER JOIN users u ON e.event_time > u.last_login;
SELECT u.id, MAX(e.event_time) AS last_event FROM users u LEFT JOIN events e ON u.id = e.id GROUP BY u.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time BETWEEN timestamp '2020-01-01 00:00:00' AND timestamp '2020-12-31 23:59:59';
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_time) AS event_year, COUNT(*) FROM events GROUP BY event_year HAVING event_year >= 2020;
SELECT DISTINCT e.event_time FROM events e WHERE e.event_time > (SELECT MIN(last_login) FROM users);
SELECT a.id, a.event_time FROM (SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL) AS a WHERE a.event_time <= timestamp '2020-09-28 18:40:05';
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO logs (log_id) VALUES (1);
SELECT l.log_id, l.log_time FROM logs l WHERE l.log_time > (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM events);
SELECT l.*, e.event_time FROM logs l CROSS JOIN events e WHERE e.id = 1 AND l.log_time < e.event_time;
